name: Mock Miracle Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the egg yolks, 1 teaspoon of salt, 1/2 teaspoon of sugar, and 2 tablespoons of vinegar.
2. Slowly add 1 cup of oil to the mixture, drop by drop, while continuously mixing thoroughly.
3. Continue adding the remaining oil more quickly but still mix each addition before adding more oil.
4. Once all the oil has been incorporated, add an additional 2 tablespoons of vinegar.
5. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients (sugar, vinegar, and salt) until they form a smooth paste.
6. Add this hot mixture to the mayonnaise and mix well.
7. Pour the mixture into a container and refrigerate until cooled.
This recipe makes slightly more than one quart.
